title: Architectural Design of Compute and Storage Clouds
description: A layered diagram showing the core components and their relationships in a secure cloud computing architecture, highlighting compute and storage services.
relationships: Client requests flow through the API Gateway to the Compute Layer
Compute instances process data stored in and retrieved from the Storage Layer
The Security & Management Layer envelops all other layers to provide policy enforcement, access control, and data protection
All software layers run on the underlying Physical Infrastructure
